channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, junction with Champion Park. Non-offensive tag on cabinet., 4th April
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes all down Carter st, 4th April
item.description:
Bad run of potholes down Carter street, some quite deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Fly-Tipping and Road Obstruction on Bazalgette Way, London SE2 9AN, 4th April
item.description:
Types of Waste Observed ​The fly-tip consists of a mixture of household and construction-style waste, including: ​Large quantities of black refuse sacks (many of which appear split). ​Large wooden panels and plywood boards laying flat on the road. ​Cardboard packaging and boxes. ​General loose litter, including plastic bottles, cans, and food packaging scattered around the main pile. ​Long wooden slats/timbers. ​Impact and Hazards ​Road Safety: The waste occupies nearly half the width of the road, forcing vehicles to steer into the opposite lane to pass. ​Pedestrian/Cyclist Risk: Loose debris and sharp edges from the wood pose a risk to non-motorized road users. ​Environmental Impact: The split bags are leaking household waste onto the asphalt, which may attract vermin or wash into drainage systems if it rains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned plastic road barriers, 4th April
item.description:
They have been here for over a month and they are obstructing the pavement and the right of way of pedestrians. They are situated opposite number 60 Pickhurst Park BR2 0TW.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked illegally on private property, 4th April
item.description:
Reported to property manager and freeholder. Interested to understand what rights we have to towing. Trespass and illegal parking.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped Sofa - Boulogne House, 4th April
item.description:
Discarded sofa located outside Boulogne House , Off Abbey street. Please remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Grange, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish problem outside flats at 1A Pickford Road, 4th April
item.description:
The road has become very messy since the flats at 1A Pickford Road were moved into. There are several moving cardboard boxes and bags of rubbish outside of the flats. This is now beginning to attract rodents and the rubbish is beginning to spread to other parts of the road making it look quite dirty and unsightly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76-78, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees crows invading trees causing environmental hazard with birds mess, landing pavements etc, 4th April
item.description:
Overgrown trees causing a health hazard not able to walk safely to my home due to crows bird droppings on landing, fire hydrant and pavements

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste and packaging, 4th April
item.description:
Next to council bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Lane, Kennington, Greater London

item.title: Old mattresses left, 4th April
item.description:
Some more old mattresses from the same nearby HMO flat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Garbage on pedestrian walk, 4th April
item.description:
This bag has been dumped since Tuesday 31 March and yet it has to be collected by the cleaning service.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti outside front of the library, 4th April
item.description:
Noticed week beginning 30th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken cycling barrier (bollard?) Broken, 4th April
item.description:
Broken bollard ? Cycling barrier broken in front of 107 High Street next to Allens Road EN3

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated foul spill (?left by bin collection?), 4th April
item.description:
This occasionally gets cleaned up but always returns: There's a foul spillage in front of our block, covering a patch about 3 metres long with an unpleasant smell. From the location, I'd guess it's being caused every time the bins nearby are collected. I appreciate the hard work of our waste collection team but on this one spot something seems to be going wrong during the collection, causing a spillage of liquid from the bins - I might be wrong about this but can't think of another way it could keep appearing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20-42, Bargrove Close, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and litter left beside, 4th April
item.description:
This bin has been added to the street and rather than reducing litter on our side street it encourages more. It needs to be emptied more regularly (particularly on weekends) and a proper litter consultation is required to address the persistent issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 4th April
item.description:
Multiple forms of graffiti here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1B, Montford Place, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter outside Ardeley Court, 4th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murrain Road, Hackney, London
